summary: Comprehensive testing of Demand Signals feature (iteration_70) - all tests passed. Backend: 16/16 pytest tests passed covering GET /api/inventory-ledger/demand-signals endpoint (returns total + demand_signals array, row fields, demand_gap calculation, sorting by gap descending, only open order items included, empty customer returns empty array, 422 on missing customer_id, item filter), item-detail demand integration (demand present when committed>0, null when committed=0, values correct), and regression tests (dashboard-summary, exceptions, reorder-recommendations, snapshot, item-settings). Frontend: Demand tab visible (data-testid='inv-tab-demand'), DemandPanel renders with item count header and table, rows with demand_gap>0 have red background highlight (bg-red-500/5), clicking item opens ItemDetailDrawer, Supply button visible on gap>0 rows, item detail drawer shows demand signal section (data-testid='inv-detail-demand').

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' in table tbody - cosmetic, non-blocking (same as previous iterations)
Pre-existing Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility enhancement opportunity

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/demand-signals?customer_id=X - Returns total and demand_signals array
Backend: demand_signals row has all required fields (item, total_open_order_qty, total_committed_qty, on_hand, incoming, available, demand_gap, status)
Backend: demand_gap = total_open_order_qty - available (verified calculation)
Backend: Rows sorted by demand_gap descending (10000, 1798, 90, -50, -500)
Backend: Only items with total_open_order_qty > 0 included
Backend: Empty/nonexistent customer returns empty array
Backend: Missing customer_id returns 422
Backend: Item filter (?item=X) works correctly
Backend: item-detail has demand field when committed > 0
Backend: item-detail demand is null when committed = 0
Backend: item-detail demand.total_open_order_qty and demand.demand_gap are correct
Backend REGRESSION: Dashboard summary still works
Backend REGRESSION: Exceptions endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Reorder recommendations still works
Backend REGRESSION: Snapshot export still works
Backend REGRESSION: Item Settings still works
Frontend: Demand tab visible (data-testid='inv-tab-demand')
Frontend: DemandPanel renders with '5 ITEMS WITH OPEN DEMAND' header
Frontend: Demand table renders with rows (data-testid='inv-demand-table')
Frontend: Rows with demand_gap > 0 have red highlight (bg-red-500/5)
Frontend: Clicking item name opens ItemDetailDrawer (data-testid='inv-item-detail-drawer')
Frontend: Supply button on rows with demand_gap > 0 (data-testid='inv-demand-supply-{i}')
Frontend: Item detail drawer shows demand section (data-testid='inv-detail-demand')
Frontend: Demand section shows Open Orders and Demand Gap values
Frontend REGRESSION: Dashboard summary visible
Frontend REGRESSION: Exceptions tab working
Frontend REGRESSION: Reorder tab working
Frontend REGRESSION: Item Settings tab working
Frontend REGRESSION: Export CSV button visible
Frontend REGRESSION: Export Snapshot button visible
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 617-660: /demand-signals endpoint correctly derives from derive_balances, filters committed>0, calculates demand_gap=committed-available, sorts descending
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 741-748: item-detail correctly adds demand field when balance.committed>0
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 699-801: DemandPanel component follows same pattern as ReorderPanel - fetch, display table, item click opens drawer, supply button on gap>0
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 919-927: ItemDetailDrawer demand section conditionally rendered when detail.demand exists
seed_data_used: Used existing Hormel Foods workspace (customer_id: 366bfcce-4d68-4daf-b9f4-cb05a35de8c8). Items with demand: TEST-ITEM-WARN (committed=5000, gap=10000), SPAM-LITE (committed=999, gap=1798), TEST-WARNONLY-732C83 (committed=100, gap=90), TEST-COMMIT-7CC683 (committed=25, gap=-50), SPAM-12OZ (committed=200, gap=-500). Item without demand: IMPORT-ITEM-B (committed=0, demand=null).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demand Signals feature fully tested. Backend endpoint: GET /api/inventory-ledger/demand-signals (customer_id required, item optional filter). Returns: {total: int, demand_signals: [{item, item_description, warehouse, ownership_type, total_open_order_qty, total_committed_qty, on_hand, incoming, available, demand_gap, unit_of_measure, status}]}. demand_gap = committed - available. Only items with committed>0 included. Sorted by demand_gap descending. Item-detail endpoint returns demand: {total_open_order_qty, demand_gap} when committed>0, else null. Frontend: Demand tab (inv-tab-demand), DemandPanel (inv-demand-panel), table (inv-demand-table), rows (inv-demand-row-{i}), item links (inv-demand-item-{i}), supply buttons (inv-demand-supply-{i}). Rows with gap>0 have bg-red-500/5. ItemDetailDrawer demand section (inv-detail-demand) shows Open Orders and Demand Gap.

business_logic: Sorted by demand_gap descending (highest risk first)

item_detail_demand_field.demand_field: Present when committed > 0, null when committed = 0

demand_panel.header: Shows item count with open demand

item_detail_demand_section.shows: Open Orders and Demand Gap values
